title: rhinanthus × lorinensis
intro: Rhinanthus × lorinensis, also known as the Lorin's rye brome, is a rare and hybrid plant species that belongs to the broomrape family (Orobanchaceae). It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and acting as an antiseptic, which can help to prevent infections and promote wound healing. Rhinanthus × lorinensis can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, where the dried plant material is steeped in hot water to release its medicinal compounds.
